title: Settings
tab.profile.label: Profile
tab.security.label: Security
tab.sessions.label: Sessions
tab.appearance.label: Appearance
appearance.theme.title: Theme
appearance.theme.description: Console looks good in both modes — the editorial-terminal language is built around tone-neutral surfaces with a single chartreuse accent that reads identically on either.
appearance.theme.darkBlurb: Console-default. Lower glare for long sessions.
appearance.density.title: Density
appearance.density.description: Compact mode will reduce card padding and row height for data-dense screens — similar to the dashboard's density toggle.
profile.avatar.title: Avatar
profile.avatar.description: Shown in the topbar and on your activity. Square crops work best — JPG, PNG, or WebP.
profile.identity.title: Identity
profile.identity.description: Your account details. These are managed by an administrator — contact one if changes are needed.
profile.status.title: Account status
profile.status.description: Runtime flags on this account. Contact an operator to change them.
security.validation.mustDiffer: New password must differ from the current one.
security.password.title: Password
security.password.description: Used to sign in to this console. Choose a strong, unique passphrase of 16+ characters.
security.password.note: Changing your password does not revoke other sessions automatically — visit the Sessions tab to sign out other devices.
security.password.dialogDescription: Sign-out events for other devices aren't fired automatically — visit the Sessions tab below to end them after rotating your password.
security.password.toastSuccessDesc: Other active sessions remain valid until you revoke them.
security.twoFa.title: Two-factor authentication
security.twoFa.enrollDescription: Adds an authenticator app code on top of your password. Recommended for every operator account.
security.twoFa.enrollHint: You'll scan a QR code in your authenticator app (1Password, Google Authenticator, Authy…).
security.twoFa.enabledToastDesc: Future logins require a 6-digit code from your authenticator.
security.twoFa.verifyFailedDesc: That code didn't match. Try again.
security.twoFa.disableDescription: Two-factor is currently enabled on your account. Confirm your password to disable — this rotates the authenticator secret, so a fresh enroll will generate a new QR.
